methodology.policy: Strict stale override prune: remove the top 75 player-market manifest rules that underperformed baseline on full history and honest 30d and 14d holdouts.
methodology.selection: Top 75 by combined full + 30d + 14d delta-vs-baseline score among strict stale rules.
methodology.recentWindowsGuard: must be nonpositive vs baseline on full, 30d, and 14d with minimum sample thresholds
